title: JAMB Warns Candidates Against Skipping Mock-UTME
description: ​The Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) has issued a warning to candidates who selected the Mock-UTME during registration, stating that participation is now mandatory for those who indicated interest..

title: WAEC 2025 Timetable Released
description: The official timetable for the upcoming exams is now available for download.
